text: Morning crew. Three drop-offs today, let's keep the bays moving.
Invoices for last week are out. Two still pending deductible payment.
Stopping by the shop around lunch, want me to grab chai?
Sunday basketball meetup confirmed at Papaianni Park, 9am.
Reminder: 3 vehicles ready for customer pickup today.
Camry rear bumper is prepped, ready for primer this afternoon.
Order parts: front grille and paint supplies for the Accord repair.
Diwali festival booth planning meeting with the association volunteers.
Parts delivery confirmation: Tacoma TRD brake pads and oil filters.
Adjuster approved the Civic estimate, scheduling the repair for Thursday.
Sandblasting on the rust job starts tomorrow, keep the booth clear.
Color match on the metallic blue is dialed in, customer approved.
Holding the Accord delivery until the wheel alignment is verified.
Reminder: shop holiday party RSVP deadline is Friday.
Discussed Saturday Desi Vibes guest segment with a local business sponsor.
Lining up Arijit tribute set and a Rajan's Curry House spotlight for the show.
Spoke with the adjuster about the delayed frame straightening claim approval.
Supplier backordered the headlight assembly, ETA next week.
Got a substitute headlight from Shah Fleet, good to proceed.
Naan tried to steal a samosa off the break room table again.
Morning crew. Three drop-offs today, let's keep the bays moving.
Camry parts arrived — starting teardown.
Paint booth cleaned and ready for the accord.

Need a hand with the frame jig on bay 3.

Junior tech has questions on the masking sequence.
Break at 12:30, food is here from parents' place.
Bumper cover blend done — needs to cure overnight.
Spray gun clogged, cleaning now.
Silver Camry pickup today at 4.
Datsun primer scheduled for saturday evening.
Order for NAPA parts placed.

Yeah, just waiting on the customer to pick up.
